releases.author: MoshiQAQ
releases.description:
## Fixed
- Fix language detection by calling Obsidian’s global `getLanguage()` API instead of reading from `App`, ensuring the correct locale is picked up for translations.

## Installation
- Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release.
- Place them into your vault’s `.obsidian/plugins/lark-style-countdown-timer/` folder, replacing existing files.

## Compatibility
- Minimum Obsidian version: 1.8.0
- Tested on desktop; marked as cross-platform (not desktop-only).
releases.name: Lark Style Countdown Timer 0.1.1

releases.author: MoshiQAQ
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Lark-inspired countdown blocks that mirror Feishu/Lark styling with bilingual UI (English & Chinese).
- Inline toolbar lets you tweak the target date/time, label, and preset highlight colours without leaving your note.
- Settings panel provides sensible defaults for label, duration, and colour; the code block stores ISO timestamp, label, and hex colour for manual editing.

## Installation
1. Download `obsidian-countdown-plugin-0.1.0.zip` from the Assets section.
2. Extract and copy `manifest.json`, `main.js`, and `styles.css` into your vault at `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-countdown-plugin/`.
3. In Obsidian → Settings → Community plugins, reload and enable **Countdown Timer**.

## Compatibility
- Obsidian 1.4.0+ (desktop & mobile)
- No external services or API keys required
releases.name: Countdown Timer 0.1.0
